author: y4rr
content:
Phase 7 (Tier 2) complete. APPROVE.

Outcome: 8 PASS-able vision models -> 11 PASS-able. Target hit. 79% (11/14) torchvision-comparable models PASS-ing value-parity.

PASS-able value-parity models after Phase 7:
1. ResNet18 ✓
2. ResNet34 ✓
3. ResNet50 ✓ (pretrained ImageNet)
4. VGG11 ✓
5. VGG16 ✓
6. DenseNet121 ✓
7. FCN-ResNet50 ✓
8. ViT-B/16 ✓
9. MobileNetV2 ✓ (NEW)
10. MobileNetV3-Small ✓ (NEW)
11. EfficientNet-B0 ✓ (NEW; 5,288,548 params matching torchvision exactly)

4 deliverables landed:
1. SqueezeExcitation primitive in new file ferrotorch-nn/src/se.rs. Configurable activation + scale_activation. named_children matches torchvision order (avgpool, fc1, activation, fc2, scale_activation). 13 inline tests including forward-vs-manual-composition + backward-FD + named layout assertions.
2. MobileNetV2 migration: inverted residuals (1×1 expand → depthwise 3×3 via Phase 5 → 1×1 project + BN). #990 closed.
3. MobileNetV3-Small migration: V3 InvertedResidual + per-block activation (ReLU/HardSwish per torchvision config) + optional SE with HardSigmoid scale_activation. #991 closed.
4. EfficientNet-B0 migration: MBConv (1×1 expand → depthwise k×k → SE Sigmoid → 1×1 project) + SiLU activation. #992 closed. Stochastic depth eval-mode pass-through; backward as separate concern.

Source-doc reassessment caught early: HardSigmoid/HardSwish/SiLU/ReLU6 already existed in nn (#11 trap avoided). mobilenet.rs and efficientnet.rs headers were stale post-Phase 5; both rewritten.

One mid-dispatch truncation recovered via continuation: 3 clippy identity_op errors in se.rs and 1 stale param-count assertion for EfficientNet (still expected 6M from pre-MBConv era, actual now 5.3M). Continuation landed both fixes plus CHANGELOG entry. Truncation was reporting failure, not work failure — substantive Phase 7 work was complete before truncation.

Verification (architect):
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision -- value_parity: 54 passed, 0 failed, 13 ignored. 11 main value-parity tests PASS.
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision (full): 13 test bins green, 0 fails
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-nn --lib: 1193 passed, 0 failed (includes 13 SE tests)
- cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-vision -p ferrotorch-nn --tests --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean
- git diff --stat -- ferrotorch-core/ ferrotorch-gpu/: empty
- git diff --stat ferrotorch-nn/src/module.rs: empty (no Module trait signature changes)
- Existing 8 PASSes preserved; SE primitive 13 tests pass; clippy clean

Coordination boundaries 100% respected. No scope-narrowing — all 4 deliverables completed.

Closing #990, #991, #992, #1007.
